observations.archetype_gloss: Represents primal, dark forces and internal psychological drives reflecting anger and obstruction
observations.summary: Dagon embodies the Shadow archetype as a primal, dark force that Dan must confront; his voice and presence symbolize the grinding, oppressive internal obstacles Dan seeks to outrun.

evidence.quote: "If ever you should alter your tone," Dagon said, his voice the sound of bedrock grinding in the dark below the roots of mountains, "merely knock three times, ask twice, then wait. I shall come. I am the cadence you seek to outrun."
